title: Subtract Whole Numbers
essential_question: How do you subtract multi-digit whole numbers?

hints: Line up places. Regroup when the top digit is less than the bottom.
Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 365. Regroup from the left as needed: 365.
Not quite. The answer is A. Subtract place by place; regroup when top digit is smaller.

hints: Line up places. Regroup when the top digit is less than the bottom.
Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 544. Regroup from the left as needed: 544.

pretest.question: You must regroup when the top digit is smaller than the bottom digit.

feedback.incorrect: The answer is True. Regroup to make the top digit large enough.

hints: Line up places. Regroup when the top digit is less than the bottom.
Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 41976. Regroup from the left as needed: 41,976.

learn.title: Line Up Places
learn.content: Line up numbers by place when subtracting. Always start from the ones place and work left.
learn.tts: Line up numbers by place when subtracting. Always start from the ones place and work left.

learn.title: When to Regroup
learn.content: If the top digit is smaller than the bottom digit in a column, borrow 1 from the next place on the left.
learn.tts: If the top digit is smaller than the bottom digit in a column, borrow 1 from the next place on the left.

learn.title: Example: 632 − 478
learn.content: Ones: 2<8. Borrow a ten. Now 12−8=4. Tens: 2<7. Borrow a hundred. 12−7=5. Hundreds: 5−4=1. Answer: 154.
learn.tts: Ones: 2<8. Borrow a ten. Now 12−8=4. Tens: 2<7. Borrow a hundred. 12−7=5. Hundreds: 5−4=1. Answer: 154.

learn.title: Across Zeros
learn.content: When the top has zeros, borrow across them. 500−236: borrow from hundreds to tens to ones.
learn.tts: When the top has zeros, borrow across them. 500−236: borrow from hundreds to tens to ones.

learn.title: Four-Digit Subtraction
learn.content: Use the same steps for any number of digits: regroup one place at a time.
learn.tts: Use the same steps for any number of digits: regroup one place at a time.

learn.title: Check with Addition
learn.content: To check subtraction, add the difference and subtrahend. If you get the minuend back, your answer is right.
learn.tts: To check subtraction, add the difference and subtrahend. If you get the minuend back, your answer is right.
